problem_title: Corporate onboarding depends on disconnected checks
problem_description: Compliance teams face slow and manual workflows when KYC, KYB, sanctions screening and UBO reviews operate separately. This fragmentation creates gaps in risk visibility, weakens audit trails and complicates defensible onboarding decisions for corporate clients.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY unifies KYC, KYB, sanctions, UBO and corporate data into one structured onboarding workflow that supports risk-based routing, audit trails and defensible compliance decisions for corporate clients.
workflow_title: From corporate checks to onboarding approval
workflow_description: SFTY connects corporate KYC and KYB checks through risk-based review, case management, decision logging and audit evidence for controlled onboarding workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for corporate onboarding?
faq_1_answer: SFTY structures corporate onboarding by connecting KYB, UBO, sanctions, and screening outputs into a controlled, auditable workflow tailored for regulated digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage KYB workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY turns fragmented KYB inputs into risk-based review workflows with case creation, automated routing, decision logging and approval tracking for efficient corporate intake compliance.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve onboarding evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves onboarding evidence by maintaining comprehensive case records, decision logs, provider outputs and review history to support audit readiness and internal governance.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate existing KYC and KYB tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing KYC and KYB providers, integrating their outputs into connected workflows without disrupting current compliance stacks or provider relationships.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYB providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY connects and structures provider outputs into workflows and evidence but does not replace KYC, KYB, or screening providers.
final_title: Structure corporate onboarding into controlled workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY connects KYB checks, sanctions screening, UBO review and audit-ready evidence into risk-based corporate workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
